SAFETY: prove the stub click mutates nothing — still on the customer list and Fundraiser is still an inert href='#' stub across the click

step 4b: genuine click of the Fundraiser stub — VERIFIED INERT (href='#', no onclick attribute, no onclick handler, class 'menu-header', no data-* actions; probe July 11). Pure no-op: the page never navigates or changes; this is the lesson's only click on a failure surface, safe by design
step 4: gesture beside (p22 'The URL just gains a trailing hash mark, and the page never changes')

step 5b: genuine expand of the Hardware settings group (reveals the Terminals link); no navigation. unless-guarded so it only ever OPENS — on a fresh settings.html the group loads collapsed (verified July 11); a shared-profile prior-open state simply skips this click rather than toggling it closed
step 5c: genuine click of the Hardware / Terminals link (p26 88.05 'Open Terminals, under Hardware')
